category: Primary tools for generating written content
explanation: Pen, Paper, Keyboard, and Notebook are all primarily used for the creation or recording of original written content. An Eraser, however, is used for correcting or removing written content, not for its initial generation.

category: Wonders of the Ancient World (No Longer Standing)
explanation: All tokens are among the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. However, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon, Colossus of Rhodes, Temple of Artemis at Ephesus, and Lighthouse of Alexandria have all been destroyed, while the Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one of the original seven still substantially intact.
Mile, Kilometer, Meter, and Yard are all standard units used to measure length or distance, whereas Pound is a unit of weight.
